settings.title: Increase Profitability by Investing in Your PMs

settings.title_text: "At TranSystems we believe in developing our PMs, but doing so specifically based on their needs. Fifty or our project managers took the Harrison Behaviors Assessment as part of our pilot PM Development Program with EMI, and the feedback was excellent. Many of the PMs mentioned how knowing their behaviors would help them to avoid blind spots and spend their time improving the right PM skills."

settings.title: Look at the holistic picture of PM development with the AEC PM Behaviors Assessment and Certification from the Engineering Management Institute.

settings.editor: With the AEC PM Certification, your PM team will explore multiple levels of curated training from expert trainers who have been in their shoes. Instead of training courses in isolation, the AEC PM Certification is a multi-step process that provides an individualized growth experience for each of your PMs by benchmarking their strengths and areas of improvement multiple times through their PM progression starting with the comprehensive AEC PM Behaviors Assessment from EMI and Talent Matters.

settings.title: But, it's not just about training opportunities

settings.editor:
Revolutionize AEC Project Management with the AEC PM Behaviors Assessment

Generic assessments miss the mark when it comes to the unique demands of AEC project managers. That’s why Talent Matters and EMI created the AEC PM Behaviors Assessment—a breakthrough tool powered by the proven Harrison Assessment system.

This assessment goes beyond certifications and experience to uncover the behaviors, passions, preferences, and interpersonal skills that drive success. It benchmarks your PMs against industry standards and peers to deliver actionable insights into their potential.

Stop guessing—start empowering your PMs to lead and succeed in today’s competitive AEC environment.

settings.title_text: "At Neel-Schaffer we believe in developing our people. To develop our project managers, EMI utilized their proven framework which started with interviewing our PMs, and then designing and now delivering a custom PM development program that will serve our 200+ PMs over the coming years. The initial feedback has been very positive, and we are excited to continue the program including the microlearning reinforcement that our PMs will receive long-term. EMI is also creating tools to help us onboard new PMs faster and more efficiently."

settings.editor: It’s Time to Unlock Success with the AEC PM Certification

It’s PM development for AEC professionals,

Your team deserves a curated professional development experience that helps them reach their full potential, which will rocket your firm to success! After all, your PMs are the cashflow engine of your business.
